_comment_format: Tibik locale-pack registry. Hosted at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HugeFrog24/libtibik/main/strings/manifest.json (sibling to the pack JSONs themselves, so the entire strings/ directory is the publish surface - dump it to GitHub and that's the deployment). Bumping `schema` is breaking; older mods will refuse to parse. `minModVersion` is checked against the running mod and silently filters out manifests aimed at newer mods. Each entry in `packs` advertises a translation hosted under strings/{code}.json in this repo. Pack JSON content shape: identical to strings/en.json (key/value map). Pack `version` is an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp; lex-sortable, no edge cases.
_comment_workflow: This file is auto-regenerated by generate_locale_manifest.cmake at every CMake configure - do not hand-edit packs[]. To publish a translation update: edit strings/{code}.json, run any cmake build to regenerate, then `git add strings/`, commit, push.
